allow: Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -ppelota10 mi-sistema-prueba-local -e "SELECT id, nombre, parent_id FROM categorias ORDER BY parent_id IS NULL DESC, nombre LIMIT 40;" 2>/dev/null)

Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -ppelota10 mi-sistema-prueba-local --table -e "SELECT p.id, p.nombre, p.codigo, p.costo_pesos, cat.nombre as categoria FROM productos p LEFT JOIN categorias cat ON p.categoria_id = cat.id WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 8" 2>&1)
Bash('C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe' -u root -ppelota10 mi-sistema-prueba-local --table -e 'DESCRIBE productos')

Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -ppelota10 mi-sistema-prueba-local --table -e "SELECT p.codigo, p.nombre, cat.nombre as categoria, p.precio_costo_pesos as costo_pesos, p.precio_costo_dolares as costo_dolares, pr.nombre as proveedor FROM productos p LEFT JOIN categorias cat ON p.categoria_id = cat.id LEFT JOIN proveedores pr ON p.proveedor_id = pr.id WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL LIMIT 8" 2>/dev/null)

Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -ppelota10 mi-sistema-prueba-local --table -e "SELECT p.codigo, p.nombre, cat.nombre as categoria, p.precio_costo_pesos as costo_pesos, p.precio_costo_dolares as costo_dolares FROM productos p LEFT JOIN categorias cat ON p.categoria_id = cat.id WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL AND cat.nombre IN \('fundas','Samsung','Motorola','iphone','Redmi'\) LIMIT 15" 2>/dev/null)

Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -ppelota10 mi-sistema-prueba-local --table -e "
SELECT p.codigo, p.nombre, c2.nombre as subcategoria, c1.nombre as categoria, p.precio_costo_pesos as costo_ars, p.precio_costo_dolares as costo_usd
FROM productos p
LEFT JOIN categorias c2 ON p.categoria_id = c2.id
LEFT JOIN categorias c1 ON c2.parent_id = c1.id
WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL
AND \(c1.nombre = 'fundas' OR \(c1.parent_id IS NOT NULL AND EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM categorias cx WHERE cx.id = c2.parent_id AND cx.parent_id = \(SELECT id FROM categorias WHERE nombre='fundas' LIMIT 1\)\)\)\)
LIMIT 10
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -ppelota10 mi-sistema-prueba-local -e "
SELECT p.codigo, CONCAT\(c1.nombre,' ',p.nombre,' ',c2.nombre\) as descripcion, p.precio_costo_dolares as costo_usd
FROM productos p
LEFT JOIN categorias c2 ON p.categoria_id = c2.id
LEFT JOIN categorias c1 ON c2.parent_id = c1.id
WHERE p.deleted_at IS NULL
AND c1.nombre IN \('Samsung','Motorola','iPhone','Xiaomi'\)
AND EXISTS \(SELECT 1 FROM categorias cc WHERE cc.id = c1.parent_id AND cc.nombre = 'fundas'\)
LIMIT 8
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in {**d.get\(''''dependencies'''',{}\),**d.get\(''''devDependencies'''',{}\)}.items\(\) if any\(x in k for x in [''''xlsx'''',''''excel'''',''''spread'''',''''exceljs'''']\)}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -ppelota10 mi-sistema-prueba-local -e "
SELECT c2.nombre as marca, c3.nombre as color, COUNT\(*\) as qty
FROM productos p
JOIN categorias c3 ON p.categoria_id = c3.id
JOIN categorias c2 ON c3.parent_id = c2.id
JOIN categorias c1 ON c2.parent_id = c1.id
WHERE c1.nombre = 'fundas' AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
GROUP BY c2.nombre, c3.nombre
ORDER BY c2.nombre, c3.nombre
LIMIT 30
" 2>/dev/null)

Bash("C:/Program Files/MySQL/MySQL Server 8.0/bin/mysql.exe" -u root -ppelota10 mi-sistema-prueba-local -e "
SELECT DISTINCT c2.nombre as marca FROM productos p
JOIN categorias c3 ON p.categoria_id = c3.id
JOIN categorias c2 ON c3.parent_id = c2.id
JOIN categorias c1 ON c2.parent_id = c1.id
WHERE c1.nombre = 'fundas' AND p.deleted_at IS NULL
ORDER BY c2.nombre;
SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT p.nombre\) as distinct_models, COUNT\(*\) as total
FROM productos p
JOIN categorias c3 ON p.categoria_id = c3.id
JOIN categorias c2 ON c3.parent_id = c2.id
JOIN categorias c1 ON c2.parent_id = c1.id
WHERE c1.nombre = 'fundas' AND p.deleted_at IS NULL;
" 2>/dev/null)
